action: Schedule execution every 2 hours, track news stories till closure, and manage array with timestamps based on metadata.

recipe.steps: Schedule the AI news update workflow to run automatically every 2 hours, ensuring new headlines are fetched, scripts are generated, videos are created, and all relevant metadata is updated for each genre.

Schedule a clean-up job to run every hour, which checks the metadata array and removes expired news stories (those older than 2 hours, based on their expiry timestamp) to keep only current news items.

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Run the AI news update workflow: fetch latest headlines, generate scripts and videos, and refresh video metadata for all genres.
Clean up the news metadata array by removing expired video entries based on expiry timestamps.
